,style:{cursor:"pointer"},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"Catalog_imgContainer",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:product.img,alt:product.name,className:"Catalog_img"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"Catalog_info",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h4",{className:"Catalog_name",children:product.name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"Catalog_desc",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:product.description})})]})]},product.id))})]})});};export default Biscuits;

sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import ProductDetails from "../ProductDetails/ProductDetails"; // تأكد من المسار الصحيح import "./Biscuits.css"; const commonStyles = { container: "layout_container", headerWrapper: "Header_wrapper", headerSubtitle: "Header_subtitle", headerTitle: "Header_title", }; const SectionHeader = ({ title, subtitle }) => (
{subtitle}

{title}
